pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor to supply 2 Water-Cooled Chillers, each with a capacity of 300 TR.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller compressor type must be Screw Compressor.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller refrigerant must be R-134a, including the first charge of refrigerant and oil.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller evaporator and condenser must be Shell & Tube type with SS 304 tubes.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The Air Handling Unit (AHU), Cooling Tower, and main piping headers must be designed for a 760 TR refrigeration load.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Supply 1 Double Skin Air Handling Unit with a supply air fan capacity of 53000 CFM.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU must deliver outlet air at a temperature of 22 +/- 2 DegC.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU must deliver outlet air with a relative humidity of 45 +/- 2%.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU must be equipped with a pre-filter section with 10-micron filters.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU fan must be a Plug fan type with a Variable Frequency Drive (VFD).
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU drain pan, cooling coil, coil casing, tube, and header must be made of SS-304. Coil fins must be plain aluminium.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Supply 3 Chilled Water Pumps (2 Working + 1 Standby) and 3 Condenser Water Pumps (2 Working + 1 Standby).
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: All pumps must be centrifugal type with mechanical seals. Casing MOC: Cast Iron, Impeller MOC: SS, Shaft MOC: EN8.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: All pump motors must be IE-3 rated, TEFC, squirrel cage induction type with Class F insulation.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Supply 1 Induced Draft Cooling Tower with an axial fan and VFD.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower must be designed for a wet bulb temperature (WBT) of 29 DegC and a cooling tower outlet temperature of 33 DegC.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower basin, casing, and louvers must be made of FRP. Fill and eliminator must be PVC.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: A chemical dosing system for the Cooling Tower must be supplied.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor must supply and install instrumentation including pressure gauges, temperature gauges, water flow switches, an electromagnetic flow meter, temperature transmitters, and a velocity sensor at the AHU outlet.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The Water Cooled Screw Chiller must be from one of the following makes: Kirloskar, Kehem’s, or Train.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The Cooling Tower must be from one of the following makes: Advance cooling towers, Paharpur, Encon, Thermal care, or M square.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The Air Handling Unit (AHU) must be from one of the following makes: Edgetech, Citizen, Zeco, or System Air.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Pumps must be from one of the following makes: KSB, SULZER, KIRLOSKAR, WILO, WILFLEY, or GRUNDFOS.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Motors must be from one of the following makes: CGL, BBL, Siemens, or ABB.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor's scope includes construction of a PEB shed for the Chiller and AHU.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor's scope includes construction of foundations for pumps and the cooling tower. Foundations for only 2 of 3 chillers are required.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor's scope includes all equipment erection, pipe fabrication, ducting, electrical installation, instrumentation, insulation, and painting.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor must perform pre-commissioning (Hydrotest, Pneumatic test, DOR check, no load run), commissioning, start-up, and a Guaranteed Test Run (GTR).
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor must provide a separate cost for a 1-year Operation and Maintenance (O&M) service contract.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The project site is located at Plot- K1, Taloja MIDC Road, MH 410208.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Client (MAL) will provide 415V power up to the vendor's equipment panels.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Client (MAL) will provide make-up water within 10 meters of the equipment.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Client (MAL) is responsible for obtaining all necessary permits for the job.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General
